nasb.text: They took them from inside the tent and brought them to Joshua and to all the sons of Israel, and they poured them out before the Lord.

esv.text: And they took them out of the tent and brought them to Joshua and to all the people of Israel. And they laid them down before the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們就把東西從帳棚中拿出來，帶到約書亞和以色列人那裡，擺在耶和華面前。

ccb.text: 他们将这些东西带到约书亚和民众那里，摆在耶和华面前。
